mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zine_reading_sessions ( user_id, zine_id, session_type, started_at, ended_at, total_duration_seconds, chapters_read, start_chapter, end_chapter, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{zineId}, #{sessionType}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{totalDurationSeconds}, #{chaptersRead}, #{startChapter}, #{endChapter}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (zine_id) * FROM zine_reading_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY zine_id, started_at DESC
